prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年清华大学在山东省综合类最低录取位次分别为约154名、155名、148名、133名、155名，整体波动区间在133–155名之间，近5年位次高度稳定，无明显上升或下降趋势；2025年基准位次约155名；2021–2024年计划人数稳定在72–74人之间，2025年扩至80人，2026年进一步扩至83人，其中理科试验班72人、临床医学类8人、文科试验班类3人；连续两年扩招，对竞争略有缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 清华大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名连续多年位居第1名，属于全国顶尖层次，对考生吸引力极强；2026年高考周期内声誉评价为偏负面，但事件以中性为主（6中性、3负面），无重大负面冲击；抖音热度排名第2（高热），短视频曝光量极大，报考关注度持续高位；清华大学拥有大量A+学科，包括计算机科学与技术、机械工程、土木工程、电气工程、建筑学、工商管理、法学、物理学、生物学、临床医学等，学科实力覆盖理、工、医、文、管各门类，与招生专业高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、临床医学、电子信息/通信等专业社会热度持续高热；山东省2026年考生总数约72万人，较2025年68.1万人增长约5.7%，竞争加剧；省控线（普通类一段）近5年稳定在437–444分之间，无明显波动；清华大学位于北京市，山东省为生源大省，2026年计划招生83人，占比较小但绝对人数可观；本地无同类顶尖高校竞争，跨省报考意愿强烈。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次高度稳定、2026年计划小幅扩招（83人）、考生总数增长约5.7%以及学校声誉与热度等因素，扩招对位次有后移压力，考生增长对位次有前移压力，两者基本抵消；在2025年基准155名基础上，预计2026年最低录取位次约155名，区间135–171名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 文科试验班类（文科各专业）（社会学（等专业））。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 临床医学类（临床医学（协和）、临床医学（卓越医师科学家））。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 理科试验班（理科各专业）（交叉工程（等理科各专业））。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间（135–171名）内，建议以二档临床医学类为主攻方向、一档文科试验班类为冲刺、三档理科试验班类为稳妥保底；位次明显优于区间下限（135名以内）可重点冲刺一档文科试验班类；位次接近区间上限（171名附近）应以三档理科试验班类为主要选择。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Tsinghua University in Shandong Province's comprehensive category were approximately 154th, 155th, 148th, 133rd, and 155th, with an overall fluctuation range between 133rd and 155th. The rankings have been highly stable over the past five years, with no significant upward or downward trend. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 155th. The planned enrollment numbers from 2021 to 2024 remained stable between 72 and 74, expanding to 80 in 2025 and further to 83 in 2026, including 72 in Science Experimental Class, 8 in Clinical Medicine, and 3 in Liberal Arts Experimental Class. Two consecutive years of expansion have slightly alleviated competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: Institutional Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Tsinghua University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. It has ranked first in the Soft Science China University Rankings for many consecutive years, placing it at the top national level and strongly attracting candidates. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is slightly negative, but the events are mainly neutral (6 neutral, 3 negative), with no major negative impacts. It ranks second in Douyin popularity (high heat), with extremely high short video exposure and sustained high application attention. Tsinghua University has numerous A+ disciplines, including Computer Science and Technology, Mechanical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Architecture, Business Administration, Law, Physics, Biology, Clinical Medicine, etc., covering science, engineering, medicine, liberal arts, and management, highly matching its enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Clinical Medicine, and Electronic Information/Communications continue to be highly popular in society. In 2026, the total number of candidates in Shandong Province is approximately 720,000, an increase of about 5.7% from 681,000 in 2025, intensifying competition. The provincial control line (general category first segment) has remained stable between 437 and 444 points over the past five years, with no significant fluctuations. Tsinghua University is located in Beijing, and Shandong Province is a major source of students. In 2026, the planned enrollment is 83 students, a small proportion but a significant absolute number. There are no similar top-tier universities locally competing, and cross-provincial application willingness is strong.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the highly stable historical rankings, the slight enrollment expansion in 2026 (83 students), the approximately 5.7% increase in candidate numbers, and the school's reputation and popularity, the expansion exerts downward pressure on rankings, while the candidate increase exerts upward pressure, roughly offsetting each other. Based on the 2025 baseline of 155th, the minimum admission ranking for 2026 is expected to be approximately 155th, with a range of 135th to 171st.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Liberal Arts Experimental Class (Liberal Arts Majors) (Sociology (and other majors)).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Clinical Medicine Category (Clinical Medicine (PUMC), Clinical Medicine (Outstanding Physician-Scientist)).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Science Experimental Class (Science Majors) (Cross-Disciplinary Engineering (and other science majors)).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range (135th–171st), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Clinical Medicine Category as the main direction, Tier 1 Liberal Arts Experimental Class as a reach, and Tier 3 Science Experimental Class as a safe backup. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (within 135th), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 Liberal Arts Experimental Class. If your ranking is near the upper limit (around 171st), you should mainly choose Tier 3 Science Experimental Class.
